sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n47855" key="qamnomh/khs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θαμνο-μήκης</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥάβδος</foreign> <sense id="n47855.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a long</tr_> stick <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">cut from a bush</tr_>, Ion Trag.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
